## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request and the problem it addresses.

## Type of change

- [ ] Add or update a curated resource
- [ ] Correct technical information
- [ ] Improve a learning path or project guide
- [ ] Fix README layout or documentation
- [ ] Update validation scripts or GitHub Actions
- [ ] Other

## Related issue

Closes #

## Resource-quality checks

Complete the applicable checks:

- [ ] The source is official, primary, or otherwise authoritative.
- [ ] The resource is not already listed under another name or URL.
- [ ] The description is accurate and avoids unsupported promotional claims.
- [ ] The upstream license or usage terms were reviewed.
- [ ] The resource is connected to a relevant category, learning path, or guide.
- [ ] Resource counts and catalog metadata were updated where required.

## Documentation and validation

- [ ] Internal links were checked.
- [ ] External links were checked.
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly on desktop and mobile.
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_catalog.py` passes.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or copyrighted content were added.

## Additional notes

Add screenshots, validation output, limitations, or reviewer guidance here.
